agent.intelligence_desc: AI generates detailed knowledge per product for more accurate answers.

agent.subtitle: Conversational assistant for your store
agent.data_will_appear: Data will appear once visitors interact with the agent.
agent.preview_hint: Click the button in preview to open chat and test
agent.intel_desc: AI generates detailed knowledge per product for more accurate answers.

agent.notif_escalation_desc: Customer asks to speak with a real person
agent.notif_problem_desc: Customer reports a problem or complaint

agent.knowledge_desc: The agent will answer questions based on this information.
agent.knowledge_hint: Add shipping and return policy, warranties, FAQ, usage instructions.

agent.install_step2: WordPress → Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin
agent.whatsapp_missing_desc: Without WhatsApp, visitors cannot be escalated.
agent.install_step2_text: WordPress → Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin
agent.install_step3_text: Select ZIP and click Install Now
agent.notif_client_human_desc: Customer asks to speak with a real person
agent.notif_order_problem_desc: Customer reports a problem or complaint
agent.default_trigger_exit: Hey, leaving already? I can help you find what you're looking for!
agent.default_trigger_time: I see you've been on the site for a while. Can I help with something?
agent.default_trigger_scroll: You've seen quite a lot. Can I recommend something suitable?
agent.default_trigger_cart: You have products in your cart! Need help completing the order?
agent.default_trigger_page: Do you have questions about this product? I'm here!
agent.default_trigger_inactivity: Are you still there? I can help!
agent.trigger_exit_desc: Activates when the cursor leaves the browser window
agent.trigger_time_desc: Activates after X seconds spent on the page
agent.trigger_scroll_desc: Activates when the visitor scrolls X% of the page
agent.trigger_cart_desc: Activates when there are products in cart but checkout is not completed
agent.trigger_page_desc: Activates on certain page types after X seconds
agent.trigger_inactivity_desc: Activates when the visitor does nothing for X seconds
agent.trigger_explanation: Triggers activate in priority order. Each visitor sees maximum 1 trigger per session. Cooldown prevents repetition between visits.
agent.fill_question_answer: Fill in the question and the correct answer
agent.question_client_placeholder: Customer question (e.g.: How long does delivery take?)
agent.correct_answer_placeholder: The CORRECT answer the agent should give
agent.review_message_placeholder: Leave a review and help other customers...
agent.default_welcome_msg: Hi! I'm your virtual assistant. How can I help you today?
agent.default_whatsapp_msg: Hello! I have a question about your products.
agent.knowledge_text_placeholder: E.g.: We deliver in 24-48h via standard courier...
agent.triggers_subtitle: The agent speaks first at the right moment
agent.insights_subtitle: Continuously improve the agent based on real data
agent.unanswered_hint: Add a correction in Knowledge and mark the question as resolved. The agent will respond correctly next time.
agent.training_desc: When the agent answers incorrectly, add the correct answer. The agent will prioritize it.
agent.intel_failed_msg: Generation failed. Select the product and regenerate.
agent.intel_not_generated_msg: Intelligence not generated yet. Select the product and press Generate.

risk.protection_desc: COD returns protection · Fraud detection · Global intelligence

risk.refusal_by_county: Refusal rate by county · last 90 days
risk.address_hint: Addresses must contain the city name
risk.algorithm_desc: The algorithm detects customers who appear to be the same person, based on name + address similarity.
risk.ml_model_desc: The ML model automatically adjusts the weight of each signal based on real results. The more orders completed, the more precise the predictions.
risk.similar_identities_detected: {{count}} similar identities detected — may be the same customer with different data.

support.title: Support
support.subject: Subject
support.faq_connect: How do I connect my WooCommerce store?
support.faq_connect_a: Go to Settings → Integrations and enter your store URL along with the Consumer Key and Consumer Secret from WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API.
support.faq_credits_a: Each AI action uses credits: SEO text generation costs 5 credits, section regeneration costs 2 credits, and image generation costs 2-4 credits depending on the style.
support.faq_sync: Why doesn't sync bring all products?
support.faq_sync_a: Check if the WooCommerce API key has Read permissions. If using Cloudflare, make sure our IPs are not blocked. You can retry the sync from the Products page.
support.faq_image: How long does AI image generation take?
support.faq_image_a: Usually 20-60 seconds per image, depending on the chosen style. "White Background" images are the fastest.
support.reply_24h: We reply within 24h on business days
support.no_tickets_status: No tickets with the selected status
support.help_desc: If you have a problem, we're here to help.
support.faq_connect_q: How do I connect my WooCommerce store?
support.faq_sync_q: Why doesn't sync bring all products?
support.faq_image_q: How long does AI image generation take?
support.faq_publish_q: How do I publish products back to WooCommerce?
support.faq_publish_a: From a product's SEO page, after saving the content, click "Publish to store". The product will be updated directly in WooCommerce.
support.faq_cms_q: Can I use Hontrio with another CMS?
support.faq_cms_a: Currently we only support WooCommerce. Shopify and other platforms are on the roadmap.
support.describe_short: Briefly describe the problem or question...
support.describe_detailed: Describe your problem or question in detail...
support.ticket_is_closed: The ticket is closed. Open a new ticket if you need help.
